command: for f in SOUL.md USER.md BOOTSTRAP.md; do [ -f "$f" ] && { echo "--- $f ---"; sed -n '1,220p' "$f"; }; done

d=$(date -u +%F); y=$(date -u -d 'yesterday' +%F 2>/dev/null || python - <<'PY'
from datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone
print((datetime.now(timezone.utc)-timedelta(days=1)).date())
PY
); for f in memory/$d.md memory/$y.md MEMORY.md; do [ -f "$f" ] && { echo "--- $f ---"; sed -n '1,220p' "$f"; }; done
